demo.title: demo.sh
demo.code: bankr "load lex-token-lexicon and build a lexicon for $MYTOKEN: 400 holders, launched last week, running joke about the deployer's cat"

setup: Install the skill into your Bankr agent
Best run in the same session as a token launch, before the first post
Save the finished lexicon as a resource file so scheduled automations post in-language
